text: Entering this space, I am immediately struck by an atmosphere of innovation and curiosity. The glass doors and sleek, minimal surfaces suggest a threshold to a world structured by thought and creative effort. The presence of 'R+D' on the wall evokes ideas of exploration and transformation—of what might be possible if only we investigate deeply enough. I feel a quiet anticipation, as though I stand at the intersection of what is known and what might soon be discovered, pondering the restless human drive to understand and shape our reality.
